title: Soapstone Jewelery Organizer Box Hexagonal Handmade Hand Carved Decorative Soapstone Keepsake Box Storage Organiser Jewellery Chest Trinket Box Gift Multipurpose Display Home Decor
features: Store your precious valuables, collectables, jewellery and more with soapstone stone. Crafted from heavy-duty natural soapstone is this hexagonal box with a hinged lid, and enhanced with beautiful intricate designs and delicate patterns hand carved on the surface to give you this multi-purpose ornament which can be used a jewellery box/chest, keepsake box, trinket box or a decor/display ornament.
Dimensions of this hexagonal soapstone box are – H: 4.5cm x L: 14.5cm x W: 14.5cm. As it is made from natural soapstone, the surface colour may slightly vary.

SOAPSTONE BOX – For precious storage and natural organisation is this soapstone box. Heavy-duty but slim and wide hexagonal with an easy open hinged lid is this multipurpose soapstone box which can be used as a jewellery/keepsake/trinket box around the home. Place it one your dressing table, drawer chest, display shelf to give a beautiful authentic display/ornament.

VERSATILE ORGANISER – It's natural design makes the box natural to use for many purposes. From your precious jewellery (earrings/necklace/bracelet), to those memorable mini souvenirs, stone collectables, coins, priceless valuables and so much more. Due to delicate design and thoughtful nature, it is an ideal gift this festive season i.e. birthdays, christmas, housewarming, mothers day, weddings & more!

SOAPSTONE CRAFTSMANSHIP - Hand carved out of soapstone by skilled and passionate artisans of India, is this hexagonal box which is further enhanced with hand engraved intricate openwork designs and smooth matte finish, to make it even more authentic & precious. The attention to detail in hand carving is what makes the natural colours of the stone stand out.
